name: ashlr
title: Ashlr
description: Command center for everything on your Desktop — search repos, docs, assets, and manage your workspace.
author: masonwyatt

preferences.name: editor
preferences.title: Default Editor
preferences.description: Editor to open repos and files in. Shared by all Ashlr commands.

commands.name: search-everything
commands.title: Search Everything
commands.subtitle: Ashlr
commands.description: Fuzzy-search every indexed repo, doc, and asset on the Desktop.

commands.name: attention-board
commands.title: Attention Board
commands.subtitle: Ashlr
commands.description: Surface active repos with dirty git status, recent activity, and stale items needing attention. Auto-refreshes every 2 s.

commands.name: ceo-dashboard
commands.title: CEO Dashboard
commands.subtitle: Ashlr
commands.description: High-level overview of all projects by category, org, and activity.

commands.name: tidy-desktop
commands.title: Tidy Desktop
commands.subtitle: Ashlr
commands.description: Preview and apply tidy rules to organise loose files on the Desktop.

commands.name: pulse
commands.title: Pulse
commands.subtitle: Ashlr
commands.description: Local-first token, cost, and activity dashboard. Runs `ashlr pulse --json` and renders totals, per-project, and per-model breakdowns with budget status. Auto-refreshes every 2 s.

commands.name: dispatch-run
commands.title: Dispatch Run
commands.subtitle: Ashlr
commands.description: Dispatch a bounded local run via `ashlr run`. Fill in a goal, optional budget cap, and optional max-steps, then watch the result.

commands.name: swarms
commands.title: Swarms
commands.subtitle: Ashlr
commands.description: Live list of active and recent swarms with task burndown (done/total) and per-phase progress. Auto-refreshes every 2 s.
